texto: When you're young, faith is often a matter of rules. What you should do and shouldn't do, that kind of thing. But as you get older, you realize that faith is really a matter of relationship - with God, with the people around you, with the members of your community.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Rhoda Janzen sobre temas ligados a fe. A afirmação “When you're young, faith is often a matter of rules. What you should do and shouldn't do, that ki…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a fe, faith, inspiracional, útil em momentos de inspiracao e inspiracional.

frase_original: When you're young, faith is often a matter of rules. What you should do and shouldn't do, that kind of thing. But as you get older, you realize that faith is really a matter of relationship - with God, with the people around you, with the members of your community.

texto: The idea is that the woman's heritage and background are just as important as the man's. Many women see taking a man's name as a gesture of symbolic oppression. It's like saying to the woman, 'Who you are as a person isn't as important as who I am.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rhoda Janzen: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “The idea is that the woman's heritage and background are just as important as the man's. Many wom…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, feminism, gender-equality pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e gender-equality.
